title: The Secret Playground
subtitle: 阿那亚度假下集：水水发现地下小探险
theme: 下沉儿童乐园里的空间探险
moral: 在安全陪伴下勇敢探索复杂的新空间；自己尝试、观察路径、发现秘密通道，体验探险的成就感。

pages.narration: 度假村真是太好玩了。爸爸妈妈带着水水散步，又发现了一个新的小儿童乐园。

props: distant upper part of a tall space-capsule slide

pages.composition_hint: eye-level medium-wide view on a seaside resort residential walkway, shuishui walking with red panda and taller white rabbit through greenery; in the far background beyond trees and a low wall, only the upper part of a tall space-capsule slide is visible, hinting at a hidden playground ahead; do not show the full playground layout yet, no miniature model, no underground openings, no skylight holes, no sloped ramp

pages.narration: 这个小广场像一个圆圆的小秘密基地，四周藏着好多好玩的东西。

scene_state.location: 圆形下沉儿童乐园平面图式建场
props: two-level space-capsule slide on east side
red green yellow seesaw in center
crescent-shaped sloped ramp on northwest half
two round skylight openings at the top of the slope

pages.composition_hint: bird's-eye view of one circular sunken playground plaza, clearly lower than the surrounding walkway; east side has a tall two-level space-capsule slide with round porthole windows and a small antenna; south side has two swings; center has a red-green-yellow seesaw; northwest half is a crescent-shaped sloped ramp with colorful climbing footholds; at the top of that crescent slope are exactly two separate round skylight openings, both circular, with rope net glimpsed inside; no text labels, no humans

pages.narration: 东边有一个高高的两层滑梯，上面像太空舱，还有圆圆的小窗户和一根小天线。

scene_state.location: 圆形下沉广场东侧太空舱滑梯旁

pages.composition_hint: eye-level view from inside the lower circular plaza, looking toward the east side only; shuishui stands on the plaza floor looking up at a tall two-level space-capsule slide, with round porthole windows and a small antenna on the upper cabin, slide chute descending to the plaza floor; red panda and taller white rabbit stand nearby; no skylight holes in this scene, no crescent slope in this scene

pages.narration: 西北边有一大片半月形的斜坡，斜坡上铺着攀岩脚蹬。斜坡顶上，还有两个圆圆的天井。

scene_state.location: 下层圆形广场看向西北半月形斜坡

pages.composition_hint: from the lower circular plaza floor, three-quarter wide view facing the northwest side: a crescent-shaped OUTDOOR sloped ramp rises along the curved wall from the lower plaza up to the upper walkway level; the ramp surface is covered with colorful climbing footholds; at the top flat edge of the slope are exactly two separate circular skylight openings with round safety rims; shuishui, red panda, and taller white rabbit stand at the bottom looking up; outdoor daylight, no interior room, no tunnel, no windows, no cave

pages.narration: 水水和爸爸踩着攀岩脚蹬，一点一点爬到了斜坡上。

props: two round skylight openings at top

pages.composition_hint: side three-quarter view from the lower plaza floor: shuishui is climbing upward on the crescent-shaped sloped ramp using colorful footholds, red panda climbs beside her on the SAME sloped outdoor surface with a protective posture, taller white rabbit remains on the lower circular plaza floor watching; the two round skylight openings are visible at the top of the slope ahead; not a vertical climbing wall, not indoors, no tunnel, no cave

pages.narration: 到了斜坡顶上，水水看着两个圆圆的天井，眼睛亮了起来。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 爸爸，咱俩一人一个天井往下爬吧！

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 好呀，你能自己爬下去吗？

scene_state.location: 半月形斜坡顶部两个圆形天井旁
props: vertical rope-net climbing shaft inside each opening

pages.composition_hint: eye-level view on the flat top of the crescent slope: exactly two separate circular skylight openings side by side, each a perfect round hole with a raised round safety rim; shuishui stands beside the left round opening, red panda stands beside the right round opening; inside each opening, a vertical rope-net climbing shaft descends downward; keep the two circles clearly separated, not oval, not peanut-shaped, no underground room visible yet, no cave

pages.narration: 于是，水水和爸爸一人一个天井，顺着攀爬网慢慢往下爬。

scene_state.location: 两个圆形天井剖面和空地下空间
props: two separate vertical round skylight shafts
three horizontal rope-net levels in each shaft

pages.composition_hint: clean cutaway side-section diagram style in storybook CGI: two separate vertical round skylight shafts descend from the slope top; shuishui climbs down the left shaft, red panda climbs down the right shaft; each shaft has exactly three horizontal rope-net levels; at the bottom both shafts open into the same EMPTY crescent-shaped underground chamber with plain curved walls and floor, no toys, no furniture, no slides, no ball pit, no decorations, no lamps, no playroom

pages.narration: 水水和爸爸下到了地下空间。再抬头一看，妈妈正在天井口上方跟水水招手。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: Hi 妈妈！我下来啦，厉不厉害？

scene_state.location: 空的半月形地下空间内部抬头看天井

pages.composition_hint: low-angle view from inside the EMPTY crescent-shaped underground chamber: shuishui and red panda stand on the chamber floor and look upward; above them are two circular skylight openings with rope-net climbing shafts hanging down; taller white rabbit is visible ONLY at the rim of one skylight opening above, waving down from outside; do not place the taller white rabbit inside the underground chamber; no toys, no furniture, plain curved walls and floor

pages.narration: 说话的时候，地下空间里传来了回声。水水和爸爸试着喊了起来。

scene_state.location: 空的半月形地下回声空间

pages.composition_hint: medium view inside the EMPTY crescent-shaped underground chamber, plain curved walls and floor; shuishui and red panda call toward the curved wall, subtle echo wave lines in the air; overhead, both circular skylight openings and the descending rope-net climbing structures are still visible, showing where they came from; no other characters, no toys, no furniture, no cave decorations

pages.narration: 水水忽然发现，地下空间的一边还有一个小山洞洞口。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 爸爸，咱去看看那能通到哪里！

scene_state.location: 空地下空间侧壁洞口前
props: low rounded doorway-like opening in side wall

pages.composition_hint: inside the EMPTY crescent-shaped underground chamber, shuishui holds red panda's paw and points toward a low rounded doorway-like opening in the SIDE WALL; they have NOT entered it yet; the opening is short and simple, not a long tunnel; overhead, faint circular skylight openings and rope nets are visible; plain curved walls, no toys, no furniture, no outside plaza visible yet, no natural cave

pages.narration: 爸爸弯着腰，和水水一起从小山洞钻了出去。原来，洞口通到了下层广场！

scene_state.location: 下层圆形广场斜坡侧壁洞口外侧
props: low rounded opening built into side wall of crescent slope

pages.composition_hint: eye-level view from the lower circular sunken plaza floor, facing the side wall of the crescent-shaped slope structure; a low rounded opening is built into that side wall; shuishui is just stepping out of the opening, red panda bends slightly behind her; outside the opening is immediately the circular playground plaza floor, with the red-green-yellow seesaw or part of the space-capsule slide visible in the background to match the earlier layout; not a long tunnel, not a natural cave, not a forest tunnel

pages.narration: 妈妈站在斜坡顶上，看到水水从下层广场冒出来，笑着招手。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 小水水，你从哪里冒出来的？

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 这里有个山洞！我从这儿出来的！

scene_state.location: 同一个圆形下沉广场上下层关系
props: two round skylight openings near slope top
low rounded opening built into side wall

pages.composition_hint: wide three-quarter view of the SAME circular sunken playground plaza from page 2: the crescent-shaped sloped ramp curves along the northwest edge, with two round skylight openings near its top; taller white rabbit stands at the top of the slope waving down; below on the circular plaza floor, shuishui and red panda stand beside a low rounded opening built into the side wall of the slope, shuishui proudly points at the opening; include the red-green-yellow seesaw or space-capsule slide in the background to anchor the same layout; not a natural hill tunnel, not a long tunnel
